strengths: 6+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles
Active work on AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
Strong testing/TDD background including workshops, dojos, and authored test libraries
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java work is older (robotic arms era)
Cloud experience narrow (AWS CDK at Optilyz); no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production depth beyond GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned fullstack engineer with well over the required 6 years of experience, a strong TypeScript/Node.js/React foundation, and directly relevant current work on AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. Testing rigor and architecture exposure are evident across roles. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js experience and limited recent Kotlin/Java work, though the polyglot background suggests fast ramp-up on the secondary stack.
